interactions.name: Sodium phosphate
interactions.description: Mersalyl may increase the nephrotoxic activities of Sodium phosphate.

interactions.name: Candesartan cilexetil
interactions.description: The risk or severity of hypotension can be increased when Candesartan cilexetil is combined with Mersalyl.

interactions.name: Acemetacin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Mersalyl can be decreased when used in combination with Acemetacin.

interactions.name: Tramadol
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Tramadol is combined with Mersalyl.
